assertion.question: What's the main benefit of revising a plan before approving it, rather than approving immediately?
choices: You catch mismatches between what you asked for and what the agent intends to do, before any files change
It makes the agent respond faster
It skips the permission gate entirely
It automatically switches to a cheaper model
